search:go-gin-swagger:gin framework swag.content:
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `go get -u github.com/gin-gonic/gin`
  - `go get -u github.com/swaggo/gin-swagger`
  - `go get -u github.com/swaggo/files`

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Gin: v1.8.0
  - Gin-Swagger: v1.5.2
  - Swagger-Files: v2.4.3

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `gin.SetMode(gin.ReleaseMode)` for production mode
  - `swagger.URL = "http://localhost:8080/swagger/doc.json"` to set the Swagger JSON URL

- **CLI Commands**:
  - `go get -u github.com/gin-gonic/gin`
  - `go get -u github.com/swaggo/gin-swagger`
  - `go get -u github.com/swaggo/files`

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Gin Framework: v1.8.0
  - Swagger: v2.4.3

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `gin.SetMode(gin.ReleaseMode)` for production
  - `swagger.URL = "http://localhost:8080/swagger/doc.json"` to set the URL for Swagger documentation

search:go-gin-swagger:generating api doc.content:
- Use `swag init` to generate Swagger documentation.
- Specify instance name with `--instanceName`.
- Install Gin and Swagger via Go modules:
  ```bash
  go get -u github.com/gin-gonic/gin
  go get -u github.com/swaggo/gin-swagger
  ```
- Import necessary packages in your Go code.
- Use annotations to document API endpoints.
- Run `swag init` after adding documentation.
- Serve Swagger UI with Gin middleware:
  ```go
  r := gin.Default()
  swaggerURL := ginSwagger.URL("http://localhost:8080/swagger/doc.json")
  r.GET("/swagger/*any", ginSwagger.WrapHandler(swaggerURL))
  ```
- Ensure unique instance names for multiple Swagger instances.
- Check latest versions on [GitHub](https://github.com/swaggo/gin-swagger) and [Go Modules](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/gin-gonic/gin).

- Use `go get -u github.com/swaggo/gin-swagger` to install the latest version of gin-swagger.
- Annotate your API code with Swagger tags to document endpoints, parameters, and responses.
- Initialize gin-swagger in your main function by importing it and using its middleware.
- Run your Go application as usual, and access the Swagger UI at `/swagger/index.html` to view the generated documentation.

search:go-gin-swagger:optimizing rest ap.content:
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `go get -u github.com/swaggo/gin-swagger`
  - `go get -u github.com/swaggo/files`

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Gin: v1.8.2
  - Swagger: v1.5.5

- **Key Config Options**:
  - Use `// @title` for API title.
  - Use `// @version` for API version.
  - Use `// @description` for API description.
  - Use `// @host` to specify the host.
  - Use `// @BasePath` to set the base path.

- **CLI Commands**:
  - `go get -u github.com/gin-gonic/gin`
  - `go get -u github.com/swaggo/gin-swagger`
  - `go get -u github.com/swaggo/files`

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Gin: v1.8.0
  - Swagger: v2.4.0

- **Key Config Options**:
  - Gin Router: Use `gin.Default()` for default middleware setup.
  - Swagger Integration: Configure routes with `gin-swagger.WrapHandler(swaggerFiles.Handler)`.
  - Middleware: Implement custom middleware using `router.Use()`.
